exercises.title: Zerodha technical culture
exercises.instructions: What makes Zerodha unique technically, and how do you prepare?
exercises.expected_solution: Small team, high ownership. Tech stack: Go, Python, Java, Kafka, Redis. No VC pressure = long-term thinking. Read zerodha.tech blog. Know: order matching, real-time trading, fintech regulations.

test_cases.expected: Small team, high ownership. Tech stack: Go, Python, Java, Kafka, Redis. No VC pressure = long-term thinking. Read zerodha.tech blog. Know: order matching, real-time trading, fintech regulations.

exercises.title: Flipkart interview process
exercises.instructions: Describe the Flipkart SDE interview process and what each round evaluates.
exercises.expected_solution: Round 1: Data structures/algorithms (medium-hard). Round 2: DS/algo + system design intro. Round 3: System design (full). Round 4: Managerial behavioral. Round 5: HR. Total: 4-5 hours. Focus: Kruskal, Dijkstra, LRU, design scalable systems.

test_cases.expected: Round 1: Data structures/algorithms (medium-hard). Round 2: DS/algo + system design intro. Round 3: System design (full). Round 4: Managerial behavioral. Round 5: HR. Total: 4-5 hours. Focus: Kruskal, Dijkstra, LRU, design scalable systems.

exercises.title: Razorpay payment systems
exercises.instructions: What technical questions does Razorpay ask about payments?
exercises.expected_solution: Idempotency, ACID transactions, distributed transactions, saga pattern, webhook retry logic, reconciliation, PCI DSS compliance concepts. Know: outbox pattern, at-least-once vs exactly-once delivery.

test_cases.expected: Idempotency, ACID transactions, distributed transactions, saga pattern, webhook retry logic, reconciliation, PCI DSS compliance concepts. Know: outbox pattern, at-least-once vs exactly-once delivery.

exercises.title: Zerodha-style problem: Order Book
exercises.instructions: Design a simplified stock order book. Support: add order, cancel order, match orders, get best bid/ask.
exercises.expected_solution: Order book: two PriorityQueues (max-heap for bids, min-heap for asks). HashMap for cancel in O(1). Match: while bid >= ask → execute trade. O(log n) per operation.

test_cases.expected: Order book: two PriorityQueues (max-heap for bids, min-heap for asks). HashMap for cancel in O(1). Match: while bid >= ask → execute trade. O(log n) per operation.

exercises.title: Flipkart-style problem: Inventory
exercises.instructions: Design inventory management for 10M products with reservations and releases.
exercises.expected_solution: Redis for atomic reservation: DECR. PostgreSQL for persistent state. Kafka for stock-updated events. Handle oversell: check-then-act with Redis WATCH or Lua script for atomicity.

test_cases.expected: Redis for atomic reservation: DECR. PostgreSQL for persistent state. Kafka for stock-updated events. Handle oversell: check-then-act with Redis WATCH or Lua script for atomicity.

exercises.title: Razorpay-style: Idempotency key
exercises.instructions: Implement idempotency key handling for a payment API.
exercises.expected_solution: Store request_id → response in Redis with TTL. On duplicate: return stored response. First call: process + store. Atomic: use Redis SET NX EX. Handle in-flight: store 'processing' state first.

test_cases.expected: Store request_id → response in Redis with TTL. On duplicate: return stored response. First call: process + store. Atomic: use Redis SET NX EX. Handle in-flight: store 'processing' state first.

exercises.title: Company-specific behavioral: Zerodha
exercises.instructions: 'Why fintech?' and 'How do you handle 99.99% uptime requirement?'
exercises.expected_solution: Why fintech: democratizing access to financial tools, India's unique opportunity, impact at scale. Uptime: circuit breakers, graceful degradation, chaos engineering, SLA monitoring, on-call culture.

test_cases.expected: Why fintech: democratizing access to financial tools, India's unique opportunity, impact at scale. Uptime: circuit breakers, graceful degradation, chaos engineering, SLA monitoring, on-call culture.

exercises.title: Company-specific behavioral: Flipkart
exercises.instructions: 'Tell me about a time you improved system reliability' and 'Describe your engineering philosophy.'
exercises.expected_solution: Reliability story: profiling, monitoring, runbooks, post-mortems. Philosophy: data-driven decisions, measure twice code once, understand customer impact, own your code in production.

test_cases.expected: Reliability story: profiling, monitoring, runbooks, post-mortems. Philosophy: data-driven decisions, measure twice code once, understand customer impact, own your code in production.

exercises.title: Zerodha system design: Real-time P&L
exercises.instructions: Design real-time portfolio P&L calculation updated on every trade.
exercises.expected_solution: Kafka topic: trade_executed events. Consumer: update positions. Redis: cache current positions and prices. Pre-calculate P&L. WebSocket push to client. Event sourcing for audit trail.

test_cases.expected: Kafka topic: trade_executed events. Consumer: update positions. Redis: cache current positions and prices. Pre-calculate P&L. WebSocket push to client. Event sourcing for audit trail.

exercises.title: Flipkart system design: Search
exercises.instructions: Design product search for 100M products with filters and ranking.
exercises.expected_solution: Elasticsearch: inverted index. Separate indexing pipeline. Filters: term queries. Ranking: BM25 + ML re-ranking. Cache: popular queries in Redis. CDN for search suggest.

test_cases.expected: Elasticsearch: inverted index. Separate indexing pipeline. Filters: term queries. Ranking: BM25 + ML re-ranking. Cache: popular queries in Redis. CDN for search suggest.

exercises.title: Razorpay system design: Reconciliation
exercises.instructions: Design daily reconciliation between Razorpay records and bank settlement.
exercises.expected_solution: Compare Razorpay DB vs bank settlement file. Identify: matched, missing in bank, extra in bank. Kafka for large file processing. PostgreSQL for storing discrepancies. Alert on threshold breach.

test_cases.expected: Compare Razorpay DB vs bank settlement file. Identify: matched, missing in bank, extra in bank. Kafka for large file processing. PostgreSQL for storing discrepancies. Alert on threshold breach.

exercises.title: Company question bank for 5 companies
exercises.instructions: 30 company-specific questions for Zerodha, Flipkart, Razorpay, HDFC Tech, Infosys.
exercises.expected_solution: Zerodha: order matching, real-time trading, small-team culture. Flipkart: scale, logistics, recommendation. Razorpay: payments, reliability, compliance. HDFC: banking systems, legacy migration. Infosys: enterprise, consulting, delivery.

test_cases.expected: Zerodha: order matching, real-time trading, small-team culture. Flipkart: scale, logistics, recommendation. Razorpay: payments, reliability, compliance. HDFC: banking systems, legacy migration. Infosys: enterprise, consulting, delivery.

exercises.title: Final pre-interview checklist
exercises.expected_solution: Night before: review patterns (not new material), prepare questions for interviewer, good sleep. Morning of: warm up with 2 easy problems, review your 5 STAR stories, check tech setup 30 min early, notes on company products.

test_cases.expected: Night before: review patterns (not new material), prepare questions for interviewer, good sleep. Morning of: warm up with 2 easy problems, review your 5 STAR stories, check tech setup 30 min early, notes on company products.

exercises.title: Post-interview debrief template
exercises.instructions: How do you analyze and learn from each interview experience?
exercises.expected_solution: Within 1 hour: write down every question asked. Rate yourself: 1-5 on coding, communication, system design, behavioral. What patterns appeared? What was unclear? What would you do differently? Send thank-you note.

test_cases.expected: Within 1 hour: write down every question asked. Rate yourself: 1-5 on coding, communication, system design, behavioral. What patterns appeared? What was unclear? What would you do differently? Send thank-you note.

exercises.title: Complete interview prep synthesis
exercises.instructions: The ultimate prep plan: last 2 weeks before interview.
exercises.expected_solution: Week 1: 3 timed mocks/day (1 easy, 1 medium, 1 hard). Week 2: 2 full mock rounds/day + 1 SD practice/day + behavioral stories daily. Day before: light review + sleep. Day of: warm-up + breathe.

test_cases.expected: Week 1: 3 timed mocks/day (1 easy, 1 medium, 1 hard). Week 2: 2 full mock rounds/day + 1 SD practice/day + behavioral stories daily. Day before: light review + sleep. Day of: warm-up + breathe.
